feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: exact minute close timestamp of the current 1min bar
feed_column_rows.notes: all other columns must be attributable to this timestamp or earlier
used for joining minute bars to seed-session governance context

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: current bar OHLC is only available after the 1min bar closes
feed_column_rows.notes: same-minute aggregates must not be visible before bar close

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: current bar aggregates are only available after the 1min bar closes
computed only from fully closed bars strictly earlier than minute t
feed_column_rows.notes: prevents same-bar leakage inside path features

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: computed from the session path up to the last fully closed bar
feed_column_rows.notes: used to reconstruct severe/reversal/mild escalation without same-bar peeking

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: close-location over the last visible rolling window, ending at the prior closed bar
feed_column_rows.notes: must not use the current minute range before bar close

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: session-level state inherited from frozen EOD/minute governance and visible from the open
feed_column_rows.notes: examples: preheat_window, impulse_window, weak_drift proxy context

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: must carry first_visible_ts and only activate at or after that timestamp
feed_column_rows.notes: day-level events must be converted into minute-visible state updates, never backfilled earlier

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: session-level status frozen before the open
feed_column_rows.notes: can be joined from the open because it is already decided before trading starts

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: derived minute governance tier for supervision/shadow only
feed_column_rows.notes: cannot be bound into the authoritative EOD lane

feed_column_rows.visibility_rule: mandatory lineage columns for every event/state field
feed_column_rows.notes: core PIT audit fields; missing values fail the protocol

semantics_rows.detail: same-minute OHLCV and any same-minute derived aggregate only become visible after the bar is complete
every event-derived or state-derived field must store the first timestamp at which it became lawful to see
the point-in-time feed may read frozen EOD context, but nothing in this feed may write back into the frozen EOD primary
severe_override_positive -> emergency_exit_shadow_override; reversal_watch -> panic_derisk_watch; mild_override_watch -> do_not_readd_watch

acceptance_rows.detail: all 6 canonical seed sessions must be replayable minute by minute using only visible columns
all event/state fields must include first_visible_ts and source_cutoff_ts; null lineage fails acceptance
no path or bar aggregate may depend on the unfinished current bar before its close
the resulting visibility feed remains governance/shadow-only until a later simulator and separate replay lane exist

interpretation: V1.33O converts phase_1_visibility from a blocker label into a concrete minute-state specification.
The spec is intentionally narrow: it defines what minute columns may exist, when they become visible, and what lineage fields are mandatory before any simulator work starts.
